plugins.name: checkmate
plugins.description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup against Spare's entire past-RFP corpus. Bundled MCP server indexes every answered row from Spare General and returns TF-IDF-matched precedents for each new requirement. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs. Built for the Spare SE team to replace Responsive.
